# YooY Land notification sounds

All notification sounds are loaded from bundled `.wav` files in this folder. No remote URLs are used.

**Files (generated by `node scripts/generate-notification-wavs.js`):**

- **gold_notification.wav** – default (Gold)
- **simple_notification.wav**
- **urgent_notification.wav**
- **dm_message.wav**
- **coin_reward.wav**
- **mention_alert.wav**
- **system_notice.wav**
- **warning_alert.wav**
- **system_default.wav** – used when user selects “System Default” (bundled tone; no network)

The generator creates real WAV files with short audible tones (~0.35 s, 8 kHz, 16-bit) so test playback and each option work correctly. Replace any file with your final YooY Land asset; keep the same filename.
